definition_and_boundary: Mean log2(CPM+1) across 0a, 0b, 2d, 4d and 7d; post-workflow detectability.
log2 ratio of day-7 CPM+1 to mean day-0 CPM+1; composite workflow endpoint.
Zero assigned reads in at least one of five public samples.
Zero assigned reads in the day-7 public sample.
Candidate reverse-complement stem count, min stem 4 and min loop 3.

Longest exact reverse-complement tract and count of complementary 4-mers for each 24-nt variable-region boundary against each publication-defined terminal adapter.
